about.title: Professional Software Engineer (Full-Stack) | Generative AI & Automation
about.description:
I work at XGaming, an AIGC generative software solution company building product-based services in partnership with AAA-level Krafton. I deliver production-grade systems with a focus on full-stack engineering, automation, and Generative AI — clear problem understanding, scalable architecture, and end-to-end ownership.

I build intuitive frontend experiences, design reliable and high-performance backend systems, and integrate intelligent workflows that reduce friction and improve efficiency. Recent work includes shipping Code Brain MCP (npm), an MCP server that gives AI coding tools project memory, task classification, and structured reasoning in one place.

I believe strong engineering comes from disciplined execution, sound judgment, and continuous learning. Beyond day-to-day development, I actively explore emerging technologies and share insights on building sustainable software and impactful engineering careers.

Technical Skills:
• MERN Stack, Full-Stack Development, Backend
• Generative AI & Automation, AIGC
• Frontend & Backend Systems
• Cybersecurity fundamentals

Education:
• Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech), Information Technology — Global Group of Institutes (September 2022 - September 2026)
• Sri Guru Harkrishan Public School (2013 - 2017)

projects.title: Code Brain MCP
projects.description: MCP server for AI coding assistants (Cursor, Claude Desktop, Codex): project memory, task classification (fast/chunk/deep), and structured reasoning — one server so your AI has a persistent brain for the codebase. Open source, MIT.

projects.title: College ERP System
projects.description: Full-stack ERP for Global Group of Institutes — attendance management, faculty management, and administrative services. Built as a college project with real-world deployment for managing institute operations.

projects.title: AI NPC Game Development
projects.description: Advanced AI-driven Non-Player Character system with sophisticated behavior patterns and dynamic interactions for enhanced gaming experience.

projects.title: AI PvP Bot System
projects.description: AI-powered Player vs Player bot system with advanced decision-making algorithms and adaptive gameplay mechanics for competitive gaming.

projects.title: Ranked PvP Platform
projects.description: Competitive ranking system with matchmaking algorithms, performance tracking, and ladder implementation for PvP gaming.

projects.title: XGaming Private Products
projects.description: Multiple shipped products under XGaming — AIGC solutions, Minecraft game systems, server infrastructure, and B2B services. Details restricted under company policy.
